title: Renewable Fuel Supply Statistics Released Under RTFO

sections.heading: Summary
sections.content:
Statistics regarding the supply of renewable fuels under the Renewable Transport Fuel Obligation (RTFO) have been published. These data tables provide detailed insights into the current state of renewable fuel supply, showcasing progress and compliance with the obligation.

The RTFO is an important measure in promoting the use of cleaner fuels within the transport sector, reflecting a broader commitment to sustainability. As the aviation sector increasingly shifts towards renewable fuels, Scotland's commitment to aviation heritage and innovation remains vital, especially as HIAL airports connect communities across the Highlands and Islands.
